title: VectorTopicMemory ReportBlock Shell
description:
Establish the outermost observable behavior first. A consumer declares a `VectorTopicMemory` block in a ReportConfiguration markdown, and the report service discovers, instantiates, and invokes `generate()` on it. The block starts as a no-op shell satisfying the `BaseReportBlock` contract from `plexus/reports/blocks/base.py`.

## Definition of Done

- `VectorTopicMemory` class exists in `plexus/reports/blocks/vector_topic_memory.py`
- It is imported in `plexus/reports/blocks/__init__.py` and auto-discovered by the `BLOCK_CLASSES` registry in `plexus/reports/service.py`
- `generate()` returns a well-formed `Tuple[Optional[Dict], Optional[str]]`
- All scenarios in child stories pass

## Depends On

Nothing. This is one of three parallel starting points.

## Key Files

- Create: `plexus/reports/blocks/vector_topic_memory.py`
- Create: `plexus/reports/blocks/vector_topic_memory_test.py`
- Modify: `plexus/reports/blocks/__init__.py`
